name: Escape Room Exit Condition One HD

reviews.review_description:
The atmosphere pulls you in straight away, the puzzles are smart without being frustrating, and everything feels beautifully polished. Each area as you progress rewards curiosity and clever thinking, making every “aha!” moment super satisfying.

The VR interactions feel natural, the environments are immersive, and the story keeps you hooked right through to the end. Whether you’re a seasoned escape room fan or jumping into VR puzzles for the first time, this game hits the sweet spot between challenge and fun.

Highly recommended if you love brain-teasers, immersion, and that triumphant feeling when everything finally clicks

developer_response.body: Good to hear about your experiences and happy to know you had some good aha moments. Thanks for sharing your thoughts with us, it makes creating the experience worth the effort.

reviews.review_description:
I like the intro to this game… the graphics, physics are good too. The puzzles get harder and harder with each room… there is a story that goes along with the game, as you work out how to escape/exit each area.

At first it’s fairly simple, but by the 4th area, I was starting to stress my brain and have to really work and think on how to progress…. Arghhh!! My head hurts!! lol

The game is great for the low price that it is, and it’s a challenge for all the escape room lovers… even puzzle gamers.

Has various options for smooth movement, stepped movement, sitting or standing game play. Also can adjust height during play, which is good and something other games miss and need.

I’d say go get it, as it’s very good value for money.

developer_response.body: So good to know that you survived the brain workout. Congratulations :) And thanks for sharing your experience with us.

Thanks for playing. Glad you enjoy it, it makes the hard work worth it. If you've finished, or when you do, you can always revisit the dance game (unlocked on finish), try the match  3 shooter (unlocked after starting final level), or see if you can find all 40 of the collectibles (spread across all locations).

reviews.review_description: This has been a great, fun game. Very good puzzles. Challenging but not wholly impossible! I've had a lot of fun playing and will be sorry to see it end.

developer_response.body: We are so glad to hear that you are having fun, thanks for letting us know. :) After you have finished there are a few more things you can do. There are 40 collectibles to find, the match three shooting game unlocked after level 4, and lots of songs to dance to (unlocked after the final level).

reviews.review_description:
If you love an escape room puzzle, this will scratch the itch. Free roam around your play space or play in VR.
Clever concept that may challenge you at first but you can soon get the feel of what you need to do.
So e clever stuff here and is sure to be a hit with those with the brains to work out the puzzles.
Nice game and fun.

developer_response.body: So glad you had fun with the puzzles! :) And thanks for dropping by with your review.

reviews.review_description: Really good puzzles. Didnt enjoy the shooting endless droids at the end but rest was great.

developer_response.body: We are sad to hear those weren't the droids you were looking for, but we are glad to hear that the rest was great :) Thanks for dropping in and sharing your experience with us.

reviews.review_title: Very cool puzzle ideas and great value
reviews.review_description:
I just finished up this game up now and enjoyed it a lot!

Having played nearly every escape room out there, this had very different puzzle ideas and was a lot of fun!  

Just wish there was more games by Damon or it went for longer

But well worth the money

Well done to the developers and also fantastic graphics

developer_response.body: So glad you enjoyed it a lot and thanks for letting us know, it makes our day and makes the hard work worth it :) I wish there were more as well. Will pass the word along on the graphics to the artist.

reviews.review_description: If you still haven’t played this game then now with the HD remastered update you would be making a great choice. I watched some old videos of the game and it looked good before the update as well, but now it is even better!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much Vasil for playing the game and for writing about your experience. Glad to hear it was a great experience, it makes all of our hard work worth it :)

reviews.review_description:
Not quite as good as IEYTD but a pretty good game all the same.

As you are a one-person-show then i think you deserve the full 5*.

Any chance of a sequal - i'd buy it?

developer_response.body:
Glad you enjoyed it and thank you for the comparison — IEYTD is fantastic. As a solo dev it really means a lot to be mentioned alongside it. I appreciate you playing and sharing your thoughts.

Thanks for the 5 stars, that really made my day :) <3

reviews.review_description:
A really nice puzzle game : not too hard, not too easy.
I like the fact we can play in a real roomscale.
I have to finish it, but i really recommand !

developer_response.body: Glad you are enjoying it and thanks for sharing your thoughts! :)

reviews.review_description: one of the enjoyable puzzle games!

developer_response.body: Wow, that's quite an honor. Glad you enjoyed it and thanks for sharing your thoughts with us :)

reviews.review_title: Good until it turns into Dance Moms!
reviews.review_description:
I liked this game for the most part and through most of it. The controls felt occasionally wonky but was always able to figure out a way and the hint system was good. However, investing hours into a game only to suddenly be forced into a Beat Saber style dance game was not only jarring, but disappointing. I must have missed dancing in the description but nothing in the screenshots implied the level of bouncing around I’d suddenly have to do in a game I played largely seated. It’s a shame because I probably won’t wait around to see how it ends. 

I might drive the point a home a bit more in the description. The only other suggestion I have is get a voiceover artist. The robot voice sounded like a bland accountant,

developer_response.body: Glad you liked it up until then, sorry you didn't care for the dancing. You weren't the only person that has said they don't care for the dance section and we have now updated the game to allow for 3 different options for collecting the necessary personality data: playing the dance mini-game, playing the match 3 shooter mini-game, or collecting figurines. We hope you will try it again and consider updating your review & rating.

reviews.review_description:
The game makes you think. The puzzles are great! The hidden objects are fun to find (think riddler trophies or feathers).

Plus there's some awesome usernames listed in the credits! LOL

developer_response.body: Thanks for stopping by and sharing your thoughts, much appreciated! And congrats on finding the collectibles. More coming soon!

reviews.review_title: Great escape game!!! Well done developer
reviews.review_description: I like playing escape games so I tried many and then I found this one so gave it a try because of good reviews. What a blast!!!! This is really a good game...well designed....good graphics and perfect gameplay . The puzzles are really well designed....smart enough to make you thinking but never frustrating. There also hints you can use to progress in case you are stuck. This game deserves more popularity and totally worth any penny. If you like escape room games like I do, don't miss it!!!!!

developer_response.body: Many thanks for checking it out. Glad you had a blast and thanks for providing your thoughts here. :)

reviews.review_title: A must have if you enjoy puzzles/escapes
reviews.review_description: You can tell this game was made with a lot of care and passion. Every detail feels intentional, and the puzzles are clever, satisfying, and fun to solve. It's an absolute blast to play and an incredible value for the price. 10/10.

developer_response.body: Glad you had a blast. And thanks for sharing about the passion and puzzles. You are right, we did put a lot of passion in there! By puzzle lovers for puzzle lovers :)

reviews.review_description: This game is really fun. Very clever devs.

developer_response.body: So glad you had fun and thanks for the compliment! :)

reviews.review_title: Great mystery game with great graphics!
reviews.review_description: This is a great game, with a story in it and with a great great as well!

developer_response.body: Thanks so much, glad you are enjoying our upgraded graphics on Q3! Oh, and the story, glad you like that as well. Hope you are able to escape it, lol.

reviews.review_description:
Final update because this is tedious: 

Brah, you're coming here and repeatedly engaging because you don't like what I have to say. Not only that, your initial response of I didn't play your game is akin to slander because I gave you a low score and you think people should ignore it. 

1. At least 30% of the puzzles are repetitive across the half a dozen actual levels, and it's not just wires, but knob turning and those silly things. Even that amount of repetition is too high. 

2. I never said all games I said many get fake reviews and any sane person who isn't obsessed with free gorilla nonsense can see that. 

3. I'm well aware of your status as an indie developer, trying something different. However, elements like high fiving a floating hand to teleport across a barrier isn't as engaging as you might think. 

4. Sorry you don't like what I have to say, understand that not everything hits home here, and maybe use this as a lesson for the next game. 

Oh and this right here is not a newspaper, this is a platform where I and other users are allowed to share our uninhibited views - it's why there's so many low effort games with reviews that put lipstick on a pig. 




Edit for the developer who can't take criticism: 

I review VR games for a newspaper and played this before it even released. It's NOT good. Your puzzles are repetitive, the overarching "story" isn't engaging, and interactions are shoddy at best. 

If you want to try and negate the comment about bots, go ahead. It's common knowledge that MANY games are bombarded by fake reviews. Yours is no different. As for some of the more legitimate 5 stars, well maybe those people are biased and happy to give a high rating when they receive a free game. 

You want to know why I mention better games in the same genre, it's so people spend their money on games that are worthwhile. 

Your game is not good. Deal with it. 

Oh and nice try at discrediting me. 




For the first escape room game of the year, the genre is not represented well. 

I appreciate what the developers are trying to do, and you can come to your own determination about graphics, audio and the like yourself. 

The interactions are better than some other vr escape room games, but things aren't fluid like they should be. Sometimes it takes multiple attempts to grab something and even with the distance grab it doesn't work unless you're within a very close proximity. 

The puzzles are quite repetitive with a lot of finding cables, turning knobs and flying drones. It’s actually rather nice when a new puzzle appears as it pulls you out of the monotony.  Other reviews are right, you do have to think here, but even then it's not as if we're doing a mensa level puzzle. 

If you want a good escape room, the House of Da Vinci is your best bet. This game is certainly no where near as good as the bots and paid reviewers say. 

Don't listen to the 5 star reviews.e

developer_response.body: The reason I continue to engage is because I value constructive feedback and keep hoping you'll provide it rather than continue to respond with vitriol and accusations which speaks for itself. And because people deserve to hear both perspectives. If you want to give it a low score, I have no issue with that, I don't think people should ignore it, it is one perspective. Constructive criticism gives specifics. Your categorization of some puzzles as "wires, knob turning, and those silly things" makes it clear that's not your thing, but for many people it is. Other people appreciate the expansion, variation, and combination of those with other elements. If there's any doubt about the reviews here, many of those folks are part of the Discord community, you can join and see their ongoing participation. The game is not like Da Vinci and isn't trying to be, it is a very different experience by an indie, not a big studio. Reading through your review on The Dialog, I see that Rhythm games are not your thing either. The 30 track auto-choreographing dance game was not added on, it has always been a core element. Yes, the match 3 shooter was added late, but was 2 months of development building on existing core tech. You feel these are "silly" but don't provide details. It is hard to respond to "silly" and "nonsense" without details. Perhaps you'll consider dropping the vitriol and providing constructive specifics as others journalists have.

reviews.review_description: You can tell the developer put a lot of heart into this game, the puzzles are fun, though slightly repetitive with the same functionality across many of the levels. It is a great exploration of what a puzzle/escape room game means in the VR world. I had a lot of fun playing, I only wish I didn’t spend this much money for something that I completed in a few hours.

developer_response.body: Thanks for sharing your thoughts. Glad you had fun, sorry you felt it was expensive.

reviews.review_description: Every room is different from the other, so it feels like there are multiple puzzle games inside one game ! Cool!

developer_response.body: Glad you enjoy it and thanks for sharing your thoughts here :)

reviews.review_description: I have started playing it and it looks and plays awesome!

developer_response.body: Glad you are enjoying it! Thanks for stopping by to let us know :)

reviews.review_description: This isn’t your typical escape room game. It’s a story-driven adventure. Every level is unique and the puzzles are fun. They really get those brain cells working. There’s so much more than puzzles. Some of the levels feel like mini-games that could be their own app. Some levels require shooting and being crafty. You can even engage with the end credits! I can tell that a lot of love went into creating this game. The dev is wonderful and is very passionate about Exit Condition One. Damon is very receptive and responsive to feedback and continuously improving the experience. Just get it!

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for sharing these thoughts. It was definitely a lot of hard work and reading this helps to make it all worth it. Glad to provide some fun and happy that you enjoyed it. Part of why I respond to feedback is folks like you that provided such helpful feedback that has made it the game it is today.

reviews.review_description:
I gave this 5 stars because the dev is so helpful.
I found it frustrating at first, I left feedback or asked for hints on discord and Dev responded, in fact very quick to respond and made some updates. I've finished the game and as with most games especially puzzle, I replay now I know what to do. Highly recommended and would like to see this developed further.
Excellent value.

developer_response.body: Thank you for checking out this game, for letting us know about areas that needed more hints and all of your feedback along the way. It is much appreciated. More updates are coming! Thanks also for leaving a review and rating :)

reviews.review_description: This is a good game. Now in the 4 room. It is a story, and you just solved the puzzles. If you are stuck, you can get help from your tablet. Graphics are very good. Nice game 👍👍👍

developer_response.body: Glad you are enjoying the game, that's very gratifying to know. Thanks for the review and kind words. Enjoy the rest of the game :)

reviews.review_description:
When I first got the game I was quite disappointed with it as it was lagging and the audio was choppy. It wasn't running well at all on the Quest 3s and was frankly unplayable. However the developer`s contacted me and told me how to get the game to run better saying that they made an update to it so the issues would go away. 

Game is fun to play, well wort to get.

developer_response.body: Glad you are enjoying it now! :) Thanks for graciously working with us to resolve the issue. Please reach out if you run into anything else or get stuck, happy to help!

reviews.review_description:
This game is pure gold!

It has a really engaging story, an incredible set of puzzles that work seamlessly with room scale or without and the developer has even added replayability with mini games and collectibles!

I shall not spoil the story, but I will say it has been well designed to connect each of the levels, with lore also included throughout!

The level of meticulous detail put to each of the puzzles and the level design that encapsulates them is excellent! There are optional hints if needed and while at times I scratched my head as with a puzzle escape room game it's so rewarding to progress!

I'm always cautious of buying a one time playthrough game. But I'm happy to say Exit Condition One has a slew of replayability! The collectible mini robots are cute and will have you applauding the developer for his creativity in placing them! Each of the mini games are fun, engaging and will have you returning time after time!

Why do you not have this game already?!
Do not sleep on this hidden gem, well worth the money and it's been a joy to play!
❤️

developer_response.body: So glad you are enjoying the game, it makes all of the hard work worth it. :) And for those that have not played yet, fyi there will soon be a full walkthrough video to FF through when something just doesn't make sense, and we update the hint system regularly based on player feedback. Folks can join the Discord to provide feedback and also get new hints before they are in the game. Thanks again DragonzHeartz!

reviews.review_description:
Exit Condition One feels special from the initial cinematic opening credits. For me, it gives early Source-Engine Half-Life vibes of mystery and intrigue. That being said, Exit Condition One is a single player escape room style puzzle game, complete with a fully voiced narrative.

It can be difficult to talk about the game without spoilers, but unlike some escape room games, where the goal is to simply exit the room, Exit Condition One is more of a narrative story that is told while you are trying to…get everything back up and running properly. Yes, you will be solving puzzles, having some story elements weaved in, both during and in between areas, but there is also action, some shooting elements, and…well…definitely things that surprised me.

Speaking of surprises, there are some really special game mechanics and experiences that are fun and unique to play and explore. I would not be surprised to see some of the gameplay elements here spinning off to become their own thing.

If you like single player escape rooms, enjoy a good story, and like to be challenged, then I think that you will enjoy Exit Condition One. I consider Exit Condition One to be one of my personal favorite experiences of 2024.

developer_response.body: We are so happy to hear that you had such a wonderful experience :) We are so grateful you’ve shared your thoughts with us, it makes all of the hard work worth it. Yes the spin-off possibilities are definitely there we agree, stay tuned! :)

reviews.review_title: Breath of fresh air for escape room game
reviews.review_description: I love a good escape room game and feel like a lot of mechanics tend to be used over and over. This game was a breath of fresh air, with some unique puzzles and mechanics that really get you thinking. If you like escape rooms, definitely give this one a shot!

developer_response.body: Glad you enjoyed it! We were happy to create this experience for you. Thanks so much for sharing your experiences here, we appreciate it :)

reviews.review_description: I love an escape room puzzle. This is so much more..driving. climbing..flying ,dancing and shooting..I've had so much fun with this game...its a must for anyones library.... great graphics....definitely different ..ty

developer_response.body: So glad you enjoyed it. Thanks so much for sharing your experience, makes it all worth while! :)

reviews.review_description: I’ll give it five stars for now. As I play through I could leave it at five stars or lower it as I progress through the game. I’ll provide constructive criticism as I see fit.

developer_response.body: Many thanks for helping me find and fix the issue that you previously ran into. I very much look forward to any additional feedback you may have.

reviews.review_description: I just got my first VR set, and this was the first game I played. I was very careful in selecting my first game, and I’m so happy I chose this one. It showcased so many new possibilities that VR offers compared to regular console or PC gaming. I loved the depth of the puzzles—both physical and intellectual—while the action sections were incredibly engaging and fun. Great music and voiceover as well. Highly recommended!

developer_response.body: So honored to be your first VR game and happy that you enjoyed it! :)

reviews.review_description:
Its very difficult to talk about anything in Exit Condition One without spoiling the game.......so I wont XD
End review............

All you need to know is that its feels like an accumulation of all the ideas bouncing around the developers mind......distilled into a VR title.

It can be loosely described as a "narrative driven escape room game" but that probably wouldnt be doing it justice!

Moments of joy permeate though out the title that's bound to put a smile on people faces.
With some further surprises that with probably confuse and delight in equal measures

A true labor of love and it shows.

At the time of writing its still in Early Access but the game is playable from start to finish.
And whilst the main story is complete, I believe the developer is just polishing up those final edges for a "Full release"........I Believe there are plans for further updates to "other aspects" of the game.

Highly recommended! a true Indie darling gem in the VR space.

developer_response.body: Wow! What a thoughtful review. Glad you had those moments of joy, it is one of the things that makes the years of labor lovely :) Indeed, there will definitely be things coming after the initial launch, which is Jan 23rd

reviews.review_title: Fantastic direction for Escape Room game
reviews.review_description:
I've always been a fan of escape rooms, but for years, they've felt like very isolated experiences, Exit Condition One turns that into an ongoing adventure, with each room linked to one large narrative, while still offering plenty of variety in layout, puzzles and what you'll need to do to progress. 
Best of all the puzzles are a real challenge making this game a great choice for anyone who's ready for more than simple trial and error puzzles.

I've used the game both sitting, standing and full room-scale where the game world adapts to the size of your play area.

This is already an impressive game and development is ongoing with plenty more planned after release so Exit condition One is very easy to recommend and already one of my favorite puzzle game son the Quest.

developer_response.body: Glad you are enjoying it and thanks for much for sharing your thoughts and giving us a rating and review! Looking forward to providing even more content over time :)

reviews.review_description: Played it while in applab. Still some polishing needed but overall entertaining and fun!

developer_response.body: Thanks for your ongoing support and for sharing your thoughts and rating, much appreciated! Putting the finishing touches on now with the help of a small army of playtesters. I see you were on build 1050, am uploading 1052 right now with more polishing to come. Please join our discord and share anything you noticed that we may have missed: https://discord.gg/2NfBumhKQD

reviews.review_title: A game that will immerse you completely
reviews.review_description: This is truly an excellent escape room style puzzle adventure. I was indeed challenged at the beginning, but as long as you carefully observe the surrounding environment and search for clues according to the hints, you can smoothly clear the levels. With each level passed, you will grasp some skills, aiding you in navigating through the subsequent challenges. Although the new puzzles await you ahead.

developer_response.body: Glad you enjoyed the game and thanks so much for your rating and review!

reviews.review_description: But it's short.

developer_response.body: Glad you liked it and thanks for leaving the rating and review. Just curious, what sort of playtime did you get? Also interested in any and all feedback as we work to create the final version.

reviews.review_title: VR needs more titles like this!
reviews.review_description:
This is a great example of how small businesses can disrupt the VR industry. I'm not an expert in VR, but wow... it is clear a lot of work and thought went into this. If you like escape rooms and/or puzzles, this is definitely worth trying. I am really impressed by the visuals.
I've only done a couple escape rooms, so some of this takes a bit more time for me to figure out... but there are plenty of hints if you need them. It all fits into a well thought out plot, and really takes advantage of VR (there are things that would be nearly impossible to replicate in a real escape room).
And the developer clearly takes pride in the work here. This is a perfect example of a title in the App Lab that should really be available in the main store.

developer_response.body: Glad you are enjoying it and thanks so much for taking the time to write such a detailed review. There is more to come and you can check out what is underway via the alpha version which currently has a playable intro/credits scene, a rhythm mini-game with 30 music tracks to choose from, and some small updates to the rest of the game. Join the discord for info. https://discord.gg/2NfBumhKQD

reviews.review_description:
Thanks so much for continuing to improve this game. 🤞 there will be much more to come!  Will definitely buy what you build!



UPDATE
Played the Office space and really enjoyed it!  Can't wait to have time to play the next level. It looks awesome!  Your creativity is to be applauded.  (Don't want to spoil anything by being specific)  Thank you for building this and please please please, keep building. I will buy and enjoy every escape room style game you build!

Intrigued by the atmosphere,  puzzles and challenges. 

Absolutely adore escape room style games and hope to encourage the development of many more!  

Thanks, devs!

*Manufacturing 
Will try other spaces soon
Thank you!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the kind words and for updating your rating&review, much appreciated! :)

reviews.review_title: Must try if your into puzzles at all
reviews.review_description:
The only thing I wish is that there was more

Thanks devs for the game :)

developer_response.body: Glad you enjoyed it! Your wish will be granted soon! There is more on the way. Consider joining the Discord to see progress as it unfolds: https://discord.gg/2NfBumhKQD .

reviews.review_description:
Escape room games are right up my alley. I'm only on the "office" and already this game has exceeded my expectations. Had to take a break because my little pug, Abby Rose, hears the call of mother nature. As soon as she is finished I'm gonna get right back to it.

I am having a blast with this early access and I already know that I'll be getting the finished version as soon as it's released.

I've only hit a couple of very minor glitches. But the glitches in no wsy hindered my total enjoyment of what the devs have created.

Well done!

Thanks for your response! 

The only problem I encountered was, to me, very minor. There were times when my hands would get stuck in drawers and chairs. Again, this did not diminish my enjoyment of the gameplay.

I am eagerly waiting for the final release.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the update on what you ran into, that's very helpful! :)

Thanks for the rating and review, much appreciated! Glad you are enjoying it. As an indie, it can be hard to find all issues. Please do share the glitches with us ether here or via our discord: https://discord.gg/2NfBumhKQD

reviews.review_description:
Is a very good scape room game but the climb mechanics needs to be upgraded, it happens only in one level so i gonna give it 5 stars.


Oh and yes i played the demo and i was waiting to play this game.
Update: very good game, now the climbeng feels more natural and isn't laggy

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review and rating. Glad we were able to improve the climbing!

reviews.review_title: This was a very fun experience
reviews.review_description: I did get stuck on the office level for a long time but other then that this game was flawless and I would recommend fully I can't wait for the full game to be released

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear about your office experience, we will work to improve that as we create the final version. Glad you enjoyed it in general and thanks for your review! :)

reviews.review_description: Haven't played yet will tomorrow but my friends showed where you but our group including me in the credits I was bawling my eyes out thank you so much already 10/10 will add my experience of the game soon and I'll update this review

developer_response.body: Was glad to do it, your group has been so helpful in providing feedback and getting the game ready for it's official launch as well as so wonderful to work with :)

reviews.review_description: Hey Damon I love your game I even played your old game squadron one it was nice to meet you, Cisco and G3 David on that game

developer_response.body: Glad to hear it and thanks for the shout out!

reviews.review_description: The game is great, the puzzles are cool, the voice acting and the graphics are cool too, but I felt lost at times, and there are still a lot of glitches like the hand getting stuck in some places, or objects entering walls or flying away sometimes, Other than that, the developers are doing a great job, I hope there will be more updates and more content :D

developer_response.body: Thanks for your rating, review, and feedback! Yes absolutely there will be updates. There will be a little more content, but added to the existing 5 rooms. The five rooms that are there now are what is planned for the final release: cyro, manufacturing, office, Exhibit Hall B, and the CPU room.

reviews.review_description: Great puzzles that kept my interest going

developer_response.body: Thanks for your review. There's much more coming as we make our way to the full release.

reviews.review_description: Very good little game if you want chill escape game !

developer_response.body: Glad you enjoyed it and thanks so much for your review! :)
